hero.title: नेपाली: Explore Muktinath
hero.subtitle: नेपाली: A complete guide for pilgrims and travelers to the sacred shrine.

guide.title: नेपाली: Travel Guide
guide.subtitle: नेपाली: Click an icon to view detailed route information, estimated travel times, and costs.

budget.title: नेपाली: Budget Estimation
budget.subtitle: नेपाली: Plan your trip expenses based on your travel style.
budget.note: नेपाली: Costs are approximate and may vary by season (High season: March-May, Sept-Nov). Prices are subject to change by local transport and hotel operators.

travelers.title: नेपाली: Number of Travelers
travelers.note: नेपाली: Children under 10 may get permit discounts and child fares.

faq.title: नेपाली: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: नेपाली: Common queries for pilgrims and travelers.

bus.title: नेपाली: Travel by Bus (Budget/Solo Plan)
bus.route: नेपाली: Kathmandu/Pokhara to Jomsom via Beni [1].
bus.condition: नेपाली: Expect bumpy mountain roads. Highly recommended for budget-conscious travelers and solo backpackers.
bus.tip: नेपाली: This is the most cost-effective way to reach the region [1].

flight.title: नेपाली: Travel by Flight (Fast/Family Plan)
flight.route: नेपाली: Pokhara Airport to Jomsom Airport [1].
flight.time: नेपाली: 20-minute flight, followed by a 1.5-hour jeep ride to Muktinath [1].
flight.condition: नेपाली: Weather-dependent. Best for the 2-Day Express or Family plans to avoid long road travel [1].
flight.safety: नेपाली: Flights usually operate in the early morning to avoid high winds.

jeep.title: नेपाली: Travel by Jeep (Adventure Plan)
jeep.route: नेपाली: Jomsom to Muktinath via Kagbeni [1].
jeep.condition: नेपाली: Rugged Himalayan terrain. You can choose between shared jeeps (budget-friendly) or private jeeps (comfortable) [1].
jeep.recommendation: नेपाली: Ideal for adventure seekers wanting to see the gates of Upper Mustang.
